1 Supplemental Figures

1.1 Figure S1: Full Posterior Distributions for auROC by Model

1.2 Figure S2: Local Shapley Plots by Model

cowplot::plot_grid(panel_shap_local_0, panel_shap_local_24,
                   panel_shap_local_72, panel_shap_local_168,
                   ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"), 
                   align = "hv")

1.3 Figure S3: Individual Shapley Plots for Top Features

2 Supplemental Tables

2.1 Table S1: Model performance by Demographic Group

pp_dem_all |> 
  mutate(across(c(pp_median...2, pp_median...4, pp_median...6, pp_median...8, pp_median...10), 
                ~round(., 3)),
         across(where(is.numeric), as.character)) |> 
  add_row(model = "Group",
          pp_median...2 = "Median auROC",
          ci...3 = "Bayesian CI",
          pp_median...4 = "Median auROC",
          ci...5 = "Bayesian CI",
          pp_median...6 = "Median auROC",
          ci...7 = "Bayesian CI",
          pp_median...8 = "Median auROC",
          ci...9 = "Bayesian CI",
          pp_median...10 = "Median auROC",
          ci...11 = "Bayesian CI",
          .before = 1) |> 
  knitr::kable(col.names = c("", "0 Lag", "",
                    "24 Lag", "", 
                   "72 Lag", "",
                    "168 Lag", "",
                   "336 Lag", ""))
